    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static MainWindow getInstance()

      • getInstance

        public static MainWindow getInstance(boolean ensureIsVisible)

      • hasInstance

        public static boolean hasInstance()

        Checks if an instance of the main window is already created or not.

        This method is required, because the Eclipse integration of KeY has to do some cleanup only if a MainWindow instance exists.

        Returns:
        true MainWindow exists and is available via getInstance(), false MainWindow is not instantiated and will be instantiated via getInstance().

        public TermLabelVisibilityManager getVisibleTermLabels()

public void selectFirstTab()

      • freezeExceptAutoModeButton

        public void freezeExceptAutoModeButton()
        Freeze the main window by blocking all input events, except those for the status line (i.e. the abort button within the status line)

        public javax.swing.Action getHidePackagePrefixToggleAction()

      • savePreferences

        public void savePreferences(java.awt.Component component)
        Store the properties of the named components under component to the system preferences.

        This uses the Preferences class to access the system preferences. Preferences are not explicitly synchronised; this happens at application end using syncPreferences(). All components which are in the component tree are queried.

        Parameters:
        component - the non-null component whose preferences are to be saved
        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • loadPreferences

        public final void loadPreferences(java.awt.Component component)
        Load the properties of the named components under component from the system preferences.

        This uses the Preferences class to access the system preferences. All components which are in the component tree are queried.

        Parameters:
        component - the non-null component whose preferences are to be set
        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • syncPreferences

        public final void syncPreferences()
        Synchronised the system properties with the background storage system.

        This is typically called at application termination.

        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • getExitMainAction

        public ExitMainAction getExitMainAction()

        Returns the ExitMainAction that is used to exit the MainWindow.

        This functionality is required because for instance other projects like the Eclipse integration has to close the main window.

        Returns:
        The used ExitMainAction.

      • getNotificationManager

        public NotificationManager getNotificationManager()

        Returns the NotificationManager.

        This functionality is required because in other project is it required to execute the automatic mode without opening the result dialog which can be disabled in the NotificationManager.

        Returns:

                          java.lang.String absolutePath)

      • loadProofFromBundle

        public void loadProofFromBundle(java.io.File proofBundle,
                                java.io.File proofPath)
        Loads the proof with the given path from the proof bundle.
        Parameters:
        proofBundle - the path of the proof bundle
        proofPath - the path of the proof to load (relative to the root of the bundle -> filename only)

      • getControlToolBar

        public javax.swing.JToolBar getControlToolBar()
        Returns the JToolBar with the proof control.

        This method is used by the Eclipse world to add additional features!

        Returns:
        The JToolBar with the proof control.

      • setShowTacletInfo

        public void setShowTacletInfo(boolean show)
        Defines if talcet infos are shown or not.

        Used by the Eclipse integration.

        Parameters:
        show - true show taclet infos, false hide taclet infos.
